function D(D)return p[D+(588471-562942)]end for D,X in ipairs({{494986+-494985;796659-796189},{-55242+55243,-834104+834213},{937894-937784,-882204+882674}})do while end do local D=string.sub local X=type local t=string.char local y=string.len local end end return(function(p,t,y,Q,V,v,m,w,a,l,j,h,U,X,R,T,A,H,q,C,N,P,L)a,N,C,X,L,q,j,P,U,T,H,l,h,w,R,A=function(p,D)local t=w(D)local y=function(y,Q,V,v,m,H,T,A)return X(p,{y;Q;V,v;m;H;T;A},D,t)end end,function(p,D)local t=w(D)local y=function(y,Q)return X(p,{y,Q},D,t)end return y end,function(X,y,Q,V)local Tu,f,lu,pu,Hu,k,Du,M,Nu,S,o,P,c,R,N,yu,B,u,e,d,Y,Au,z,K,i,hu,mu,I,Qu,O,Pu,au,m,w,G,Ru,Lu,x,E,qu,vu,wu,Uu,J,Cu,Xu,b,ju,Vu,n,W,F,s,T,r,Z,g,tu while X do if X<8500911-(-150053)then if
